title: Unified Case Bundle Schema
description: Schema for the unified end-to-end case bundle consumed across radiology fact extraction, smoking eligibility assessment, and follow-up recommendation experiments.

case_id.description: Unique case identifier for the bundled sample, for example CASE-10001401-001.

subject_id.description: Patient subject identifier shared across all linked records in this unified case bundle.

demographics.description: Demographic attributes linked from the patient-level source tables for this case bundle.

age.description: Patient age in years at the time of case assembly, or null when unavailable from the source tables.

sex.description: Normalized administrative sex value from the demographics source, or null when unavailable.

race.description: Race or ethnicity string linked to the patient record, or null when unavailable or withheld.

insurance.description: Insurance category associated with the patient record, or null when unavailable.

source.description: Source file or table used to populate the demographics block, such as mimic-iv-3.1/patients.csv.

missing_flags.description: List of demographics fields that are missing, unavailable, or not yet extracted for this case.

items.description: Name of a demographics field that is missing or unresolved in this case bundle.

radiology_facts.description: One or more radiology fact extraction records linked into this case bundle.

smoking_eligibility.description: Structured smoking history and high-risk screening eligibility record, or null when no discharge note is available.

recommendation_target.description: Ground-truth recommendation fields and structured recommendation output associated with this case bundle.

ground_truth_action.description: Free-text follow-up action extracted from the report or annotation source, or null when unavailable.

ground_truth_source.description: Source of the ground-truth recommendation label, or null when no label source is available.

ground_truth_interval.description: Free-text or normalized interval string associated with the ground-truth recommendation, or null when unavailable.

recommendation_output.description: Structured recommendation output linked to this case, or null for partially labeled or unlabeled samples.

provenance.description: Source tracking metadata describing which notes and pipeline version produced this bundled case record.

radiology_note_ids.description: List of radiology note identifiers used to assemble the radiology facts for this case.

items.description: Radiology note identifier included in this case bundle.

discharge_note_id.description: Discharge note identifier used for smoking eligibility extraction, or null when no discharge note was linked.

data_version.description: Version string for the underlying clinical data release, such as mimic-iv-note-2.2.

extraction_date.description: Calendar date when this unified case bundle was assembled or exported in ISO 8601 date format.

pipeline_version.description: Version identifier of the end-to-end data assembly pipeline that produced this case bundle.

split.description: Dataset partition assigned to this case bundle for training, validation, testing, or inference-only use.

label_quality.description: Quality tier describing the trust level and completeness of the recommendation target labels for this case.

case_notes.description: Optional free-text notes about linkage decisions, ambiguity, exclusions, or manual review for this case.
